requiredDocuments: Color scan of Passport bio-data page (minimum 6 months validity)
Passport size photograph with white background
Financial proof (Bank statement with minimum Rs. 2,00,000 balance)
Employment certificate or company registration docs
features: Pre-check screening to reduce rejection risk
Coordinated submission to Hong Kong Immigration Department

visaTypes: Short-Term Tourist Visa (Single Entry up to 90 days)
requiredDocuments: Original Passport with at least 2 blank pages
Visa application form with photo attached
Detailed daily travel program (Schedule of stay)
features: Itinerary compilation according to embassy guidelines

visaTypes: Short-Stay Schengen Visa (Tourist/Business up to 90 days)
requiredDocuments: Original Passport valid for at least 3 months after departure
Personal bank statements of last 6 months & salary slips
features: Assistance in booking embassy VFS appointment slots
Vetting of documents and insurance matching
